name: Barack Obama
profession: Former President of the United States
excerpt: Barack Obama served as the 44th President of the United States from 2009 to 2017, becoming the first African American to hold the office. He was awarded the Nobel Peace Prize in 2009.

name: Donald Trump
profession: Former President of the United States
excerpt: Donald Trump served as the 45th President of the United States from 2017 to 2021. Before politics, he was a real estate mogul and television personality on The Apprentice.

name: Joe Biden
excerpt: Joe Biden is the 46th President of the United States, taking office in 2021. He previously served as Vice President under Barack Obama and as a U.S. Senator from Delaware.

name: Angela Merkel
excerpt: Angela Merkel served as Chancellor of Germany from 2005 to 2021, leading the country for 16 years. She was widely regarded as the de facto leader of the European Union.

name: Emmanuel Macron
excerpt: Emmanuel Macron is the President of France, in office since 2017. He founded the centrist political movement En Marche! and previously served as Minister of Economy.

name: Boris Johnson
profession: Former Prime Minister of the United Kingdom
birthPlace: New York City, New York, USA
excerpt: Boris Johnson served as Prime Minister of the United Kingdom from 2019 to 2022. He previously served as Mayor of London and was a leading figure in the Brexit campaign.

name: Justin Trudeau
excerpt: Justin Trudeau has served as Prime Minister of Canada since 2015, leading the Liberal Party. He is the son of former Prime Minister Pierre Trudeau.

name: Jacinda Ardern
profession: Former Prime Minister of New Zealand
excerpt: Jacinda Ardern served as Prime Minister of New Zealand from 2017 to 2023. She gained international acclaim for her handling of the Christchurch mosque shootings and the COVID-19 pandemic.

name: Narendra Modi
excerpt: Narendra Modi has served as Prime Minister of India since 2014. He previously served as Chief Minister of Gujarat and is a member of the Bharatiya Janata Party.

name: Vladimir Putin
excerpt: Vladimir Putin has been President of Russia since 2000, with a brief stint as Prime Minister. He is the longest-serving Russian leader since Joseph Stalin.

name: Xi Jinping
excerpt: Xi Jinping is the General Secretary of the Communist Party of China and President of the People's Republic of China. He is considered the most powerful Chinese leader since Mao Zedong.

name: Volodymyr Zelenskyy
birthPlace: Kryvyi Rih, Ukrainian SSR, Soviet Union
excerpt: Volodymyr Zelenskyy is the President of Ukraine, in office since 2019. A former comedian and actor, he gained worldwide recognition for his leadership during the Russian invasion.

name: Theresa May
profession: Former Prime Minister of the United Kingdom
excerpt: Theresa May served as Prime Minister of the United Kingdom from 2016 to 2019. She was the second female Prime Minister of the UK after Margaret Thatcher.

name: Hillary Clinton
excerpt: Hillary Clinton served as U.S. Secretary of State from 2009 to 2013 and was the Democratic nominee for President in 2016. She also served as a U.S. Senator from New York.

name: Bernie Sanders
excerpt: Bernie Sanders is a U.S. Senator from Vermont and a prominent progressive voice in American politics. He ran for President in 2016 and 2020.

name: Nancy Pelosi
profession: Former Speaker of the U.S. House
excerpt: Nancy Pelosi served as Speaker of the United States House of Representatives from 2007 to 2011 and again from 2019 to 2023. She was the first woman to hold the office.

name: Jeremy Corbyn
profession: Former Leader of the Labour Party
excerpt: Jeremy Corbyn served as Leader of the Labour Party and Leader of the Opposition from 2015 to 2020. He is a lifelong anti-war activist and socialist.

name: Tony Blair
profession: Former Prime Minister of the United Kingdom
excerpt: Tony Blair served as Prime Minister of the United Kingdom from 1997 to 2007, the longest-serving Labour Prime Minister. He led the UK during the Iraq War.

name: Olaf Scholz
excerpt: Olaf Scholz has served as Chancellor of Germany since 2021. He previously served as Vice Chancellor and Minister of Finance under Angela Merkel.

name: Jair Bolsonaro
excerpt: Jair Bolsonaro served as President of Brazil from 2019 to 2023. A former military officer, he was known for his far-right populist views.

name: Luiz Inacio Lula da Silva
excerpt: Luiz Inacio Lula da Silva is the President of Brazil, serving since 2023 after previously holding office from 2003 to 2010. He is a founding member of the Workers Party.

name: Scott Morrison
excerpt: Scott Morrison served as Prime Minister of Australia from 2018 to 2022. He led the country through the devastating 2019-2020 bushfire season.

name: Anthony Albanese
excerpt: Anthony Albanese has served as Prime Minister of Australia since 2022. He is the leader of the Australian Labor Party.

name: Rishi Sunak
profession: Prime Minister of the United Kingdom
excerpt: Rishi Sunak became Prime Minister of the United Kingdom in October 2022. He previously served as Chancellor of the Exchequer under Boris Johnson.

name: Ursula von der Leyen
excerpt: Ursula von der Leyen has served as President of the European Commission since 2019. She previously served as German Minister of Defence.

name: Shinzo Abe
excerpt: Shinzo Abe served as Prime Minister of Japan from 2006 to 2007 and again from 2012 to 2020. He was the longest-serving Prime Minister in Japanese history.

name: Imran Khan
excerpt: Imran Khan served as Prime Minister of Pakistan from 2018 to 2022. Before politics, he was a legendary cricketer who captained Pakistan to World Cup victory in 1992.

name: Cyril Ramaphosa
excerpt: Cyril Ramaphosa has served as President of South Africa since 2018. A former anti-apartheid activist and trade union leader, he also became a successful businessman.

name: Pedro Sanchez
excerpt: Pedro Sanchez has served as Prime Minister of Spain since 2018. He is the leader of the Spanish Socialist Workers Party.

name: MrBeast
excerpt: MrBeast, whose real name is Jimmy Donaldson, is the most-subscribed individual YouTuber known for his expensive stunts and philanthropic giveaways. He founded Feastables and TeamTrees.

name: PewDiePie
excerpt: PewDiePie, born Felix Kjellberg, is one of the most subscribed individual YouTubers, known for his video game commentaries and meme reviews. He has been a dominant force on the platform since 2010.

name: Logan Paul
excerpt: Logan Paul is a YouTuber, actor, and professional boxer. He rose to fame on Vine before transitioning to YouTube and later co-founding the sports drink Prime with KSI.

name: Jake Paul
excerpt: Jake Paul is a YouTuber turned professional boxer who gained fame on Vine and Disney Channel. He has headlined major pay-per-view boxing events.

name: KSI
excerpt: KSI, born Olajide Olatunji, is a British YouTuber, rapper, and professional boxer. He co-founded Prime Hydration with Logan Paul and has released multiple music albums.

name: David Dobrik
excerpt: David Dobrik is a Slovak-American YouTuber known for his high-energy vlogs featuring his friend group. He co-founded the photo app Dispo.

name: Emma Chamberlain
excerpt: Emma Chamberlain is a YouTuber known for her innovative editing style and relatable content. She founded Chamberlain Coffee and has collaborated with major fashion brands.

name: Charli D'Amelio
excerpt: Charli D'Amelio is a social media personality and dancer who became the most-followed creator on TikTok. She has appeared in films and launched her own products.

name: Dixie D'Amelio
excerpt: Dixie D'Amelio is a singer and social media personality who rose to fame alongside her sister Charli on TikTok. She has released multiple singles and an EP.

name: Addison Rae
excerpt: Addison Rae is a TikTok personality, actress, and singer who became one of the platform's most followed creators. She starred in the film He's All That.

name: Bella Poarch
excerpt: Bella Poarch is a Filipino-American singer and TikTok personality who became famous for her lip-sync videos. Her single Build a Bitch went viral globally.

name: Zach King
excerpt: Zach King is a filmmaker and social media personality known for his viral magic vines and trick videos. He won the first Vine European Film Festival.

name: Loren Gray
excerpt: Loren Gray is a singer and social media personality who was the most-followed person on TikTok before Charli D'Amelio. She has released several music singles.

name: James Charles
excerpt: James Charles is a makeup artist and beauty YouTuber who became the first male CoverGirl ambassador. He has amassed millions of followers across social media platforms.

name: Jeffree Star
excerpt: Jeffree Star is a makeup artist, entrepreneur, and social media personality who founded Jeffree Star Cosmetics. He is one of the most influential figures in the beauty industry.

name: NikkieTutorials
excerpt: Nikkie de Jager, known as NikkieTutorials, is a Dutch makeup artist and YouTuber. She gained worldwide attention for her Power of Makeup video and coming out as transgender.

name: Marques Brownlee
excerpt: Marques Brownlee, known as MKBHD, is a tech reviewer and YouTuber known for his high-quality gadget reviews. He has interviewed major tech CEOs including Elon Musk and Bill Gates.

name: Casey Neistat
excerpt: Casey Neistat is a YouTuber, filmmaker, and vlogger known for his daily vlogs and creative storytelling. He co-founded the multimedia company Beme.

name: Lilly Singh
excerpt: Lilly Singh is a Canadian YouTuber, comedian, and actress known for her channel IISuperwomanII. She hosted her own late-night talk show A Little Late with Lilly Singh.

name: Markiplier
excerpt: Markiplier, born Mark Fischbach, is a gaming YouTuber known for his energetic commentary and Let's Play videos. He has also ventured into scripted content and film production.

name: Jacksepticeye
excerpt: Jacksepticeye, born Sean McLoughlin, is an Irish gaming YouTuber known for his high-energy Let's Play videos. He founded the charity clothing line Cloak.

name: Dream
excerpt: Dream is a Minecraft YouTuber known for his speedruns, manhunt videos, and face reveal. He is one of the most popular gaming creators on the platform.

name: GeorgeNotFound
excerpt: GeorgeNotFound is a Minecraft YouTuber and Twitch streamer known for his collaborations with Dream and Sapnap. He is a member of the Dream SMP.

name: Sapnap
excerpt: Sapnap is a Minecraft YouTuber and Twitch streamer and a core member of the Dream SMP. He is also the founder of the gaming organization Sapnap.

name: Elon Musk
excerpt: Elon Musk is the CEO of Tesla, SpaceX, and X (formerly Twitter). He is one of the wealthiest people in the world and a pioneer in electric vehicles and space exploration.

name: Jeff Bezos
excerpt: Jeff Bezos founded Amazon in 1994 and grew it into the world's largest e-commerce company. He also owns The Washington Post and founded the aerospace company Blue Origin.

name: Mark Zuckerberg
excerpt: Mark Zuckerberg co-founded Facebook in 2004 and serves as CEO of Meta Platforms. He is one of the most influential figures in social media and technology.

name: Bill Gates
excerpt: Bill Gates co-founded Microsoft and led it to become the world's largest personal computer software company. He now focuses on philanthropy through the Bill & Melinda Gates Foundation.

name: Steve Jobs
excerpt: Steve Jobs co-founded Apple Inc. and served as its CEO, leading the development of the Mac, iPhone, and iPad. He transformed multiple industries from personal computing to music.

name: Tim Cook
excerpt: Tim Cook has served as CEO of Apple since 2011, succeeding Steve Jobs. He previously served as Apple's Chief Operating Officer and is known for his supply chain expertise.

name: Sundar Pichai
excerpt: Sundar Pichai is the CEO of Alphabet Inc. and Google LLC. He played a key role in developing Google Chrome and Chrome OS.

name: Satya Nadella
excerpt: Satya Nadella has served as CEO of Microsoft since 2014, focusing on cloud computing and AI. He has led Microsoft to become one of the most valuable companies in the world.

name: Jensen Huang
excerpt: Jensen Huang co-founded NVIDIA and serves as its CEO, leading the company to become the dominant player in AI chips and graphics processing units.

name: Sam Altman
excerpt: Sam Altman is the CEO of OpenAI, the company behind ChatGPT. He previously served as president of Y Combinator and has been a leading voice in AI development.

name: Sheryl Sandberg
excerpt: Sheryl Sandberg served as COO of Facebook (Meta) from 2008 to 2022. She is the author of the bestselling book Lean In.

name: Susan Wojcicki
excerpt: Susan Wojcicki served as CEO of YouTube from 2014 to 2023. She was Google's first marketing manager and played a key role in the acquisition of YouTube.

name: Jack Dorsey
excerpt: Jack Dorsey co-founded Twitter and served as its CEO twice, and also co-founded Block (formerly Square). He is a prominent figure in fintech and social media.

name: Reed Hastings
excerpt: Reed Hastings co-founded Netflix in 1997 and served as its CEO until 2023. He transformed the company from a DVD rental service into a global streaming giant.

name: Brian Chesky
excerpt: Brian Chesky co-founded Airbnb in 2008 and serves as its CEO. He has transformed the hospitality industry by creating the world's largest home-sharing platform.

name: Travis Kalanick
excerpt: Travis Kalanick co-founded Uber and served as its CEO from 2010 to 2017. He also co-founded the cloud kitchen company CloudKitchens.

name: Demis Hassabis
excerpt: Demis Hassabis is the co-founder and CEO of DeepMind, the AI research lab acquired by Google. He is a former child chess prodigy and neuroscience researcher.

name: Larry Page
excerpt: Larry Page co-founded Google with Sergey Brin in 1998. He served as CEO of Alphabet from 2015 to 2019.

name: Sergey Brin
excerpt: Sergey Brin co-founded Google with Larry Page. He is a computer scientist and has focused on special projects at Alphabet.

name: Peter Thiel
excerpt: Peter Thiel is a venture capitalist, entrepreneur, and author who co-founded PayPal and Palantir Technologies. He was an early investor in Facebook.

name: Gordon Ramsay
excerpt: Gordon Ramsay is a Michelin-starred chef, restaurateur, and television personality known for shows like Hell's Kitchen and MasterChef.

name: Ryan Seacrest

name: Oprah Winfrey
profession: Talk Show Host and Media Mogul
excerpt: Oprah Winfrey is a talk show host, media executive, and philanthropist who created The Oprah Winfrey Show. She is one of the most influential women in media.

name: Ellen DeGeneres
excerpt: Ellen DeGeneres is a comedian and television host who hosted The Ellen DeGeneres Show for 19 seasons. She is a prominent LGBTQ+ advocate.

name: Dr. Phil McGraw

excerpt: Jimmy Kimmel is a comedian and host of Jimmy Kimmel Live! He has hosted the Academy Awards multiple times.

name: Stephen Colbert
excerpt: Stephen Colbert is a comedian and host of The Late Show with Stephen Colbert. He previously hosted The Colbert Report on Comedy Central.

name: James Corden

name: Steve Harvey

name: Wendy Williams

name: Martha Stewart

name: Judge Judy

name: Kris Jenner
excerpt: Kris Jenner is a television personality and businesswoman who stars in Keeping Up with the Kardashians and manages her children's careers.

name: Kim Kardashian

name: Kylie Jenner
excerpt: Kylie Jenner is a reality television star and entrepreneur who founded Kylie Cosmetics. She was named the world's youngest self-made billionaire by Forbes.

excerpt: Kourtney Kardashian is a reality television star known for Keeping Up with the Kardashians. She founded the lifestyle brand Poosh.

birthPlace: New York City, New York, USA

excerpt: Nicole Richie is a television personality and fashion designer known for starring in The Simple Life alongside Paris Hilton.

name: Snooki
excerpt: Nicole Polizzi, known as Snooki, is a reality television star who gained fame on MTV's Jersey Shore.

name: Jamie Oliver
excerpt: Jamie Oliver is a celebrity chef, restaurateur, and cookbook author known for his campaign for healthier school meals.

name: Anthony Bourdain
birthPlace: New York City, New York, USA
excerpt: Anthony Bourdain was a celebrated chef, author, and television host known for Parts Unknown and Kitchen Confidential.

name: Julia Child

birthPlace: Sankt Veit an der Glan, Austria
excerpt: Wolfgang Puck is an Austrian-American chef and restaurateur known for his fine dining and celebrity catering.

name: Emeril Lagasse
excerpt: Emeril Lagasse is a celebrity chef and television personality known for his catchphrase Bam!

name: Ina Garten
excerpt: Ina Garten is a celebrity chef and host of Barefoot Contessa on Food Network.

name: Nigella Lawson

name: Giada De Laurentiis

name: Jose Andres
excerpt: Jose Andres is a Michelin-starred chef and humanitarian who founded World Central Kitchen.

name: Warren Buffett
profession: Investor and CEO of Berkshire Hathaway
excerpt: Warren Buffett is one of the most successful investors in the world and the CEO of Berkshire Hathaway. He is known as the Oracle of Omaha.

name: Richard Branson

name: Bernard Arnault
excerpt: Bernard Arnault is the chairman and CEO of LVMH Moet Hennessy Louis Vuitton, the world's largest luxury goods company.

excerpt: Michael Bloomberg is a businessman and philanthropist who co-founded Bloomberg L.P. and served as Mayor of New York City.

excerpt: Larry Ellison co-founded Oracle Corporation and served as its CEO for 37 years.

name: Carlos Slim

name: Mukesh Ambani

name: Jack Ma

name: Masayoshi Son

name: Bob Iger

name: David Fincher

name: Peter Jackson

name: Kathryn Bigelow

name: Bong Joon-ho

name: Taika Waititi

name: Jordan Peele

excerpt: Ali Wong is a stand-up comedian known for her Netflix specials Baby Cobra and Hard Knock Wife.

name: Gabriel Iglesias

name: Jim Carrey
excerpt: Jim Carrey is a comedian known for his energetic slapstick performances in films like Ace Ventura, The Mask, and Dumb and Dumber.

name: Lionel Messi

name: Roger Federer

excerpt: Michael Jordan is widely regarded as the greatest basketball player of all time, winning six NBA championships with the Chicago Bulls.

name: LeBron James

name: Floyd Mayweather

name: Ariana Grande
excerpt: Ariana Grande is a singer known for her wide vocal range and has become one of the best-selling music artists in the world.

name: Billie Eilish
excerpt: Billie Eilish gained fame as a teenager with her debut single Ocean Eyes and has won multiple Grammy Awards.

name: Drake
excerpt: Drake is a Canadian rapper and singer who is one of the best-selling music artists of all time.

name: Bruno Mars
excerpt: Bruno Mars is a singer-songwriter known for his retro showmanship and has won multiple Grammy Awards.

name: Lady Gaga
birthPlace: New York City, New York, USA
excerpt: Lady Gaga is a singer and actress known for her provocative style. She won an Oscar for her role in A Star Is Born.

name: Rihanna
excerpt: Rihanna is a singer and businesswoman who founded Fenty Beauty. She is one of the best-selling music artists of all time.

name: Dwayne Johnson
excerpt: Dwayne The Rock Johnson is an actor and former professional wrestler. He is one of the highest-paid actors in the world.

name: Tom Cruise
excerpt: Tom Cruise is known for the Mission: Impossible franchise and his dedication to performing his own stunts.

name: Leonardo DiCaprio
excerpt: Leonardo DiCaprio is an acclaimed actor who won an Oscar for The Revenant. He is also a prominent environmental activist.

name: Brad Pitt
excerpt: Brad Pitt is an award-winning actor known for films like Fight Club and Once Upon a Time in Hollywood. He founded Plan B Entertainment.

name: Scarlett Johansson
birthPlace: New York City, New York, USA
excerpt: Scarlett Johansson is one of the highest-grossing actresses of all time, known for her role as Black Widow in the Marvel Cinematic Universe.

name: Jennifer Lawrence
excerpt: Jennifer Lawrence is an Oscar-winning actress known for The Hunger Games series and Silver Linings Playbook.

name: Zendaya
excerpt: Zendaya is an actress known for her Emmy-winning role in Euphoria and starring in Spider-Man and Dune.

name: Tom Holland

name: Margot Robbie
